seoTitle: Eviron vs Ewingsdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eviron and Ewingsdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eviron and Ewingsdale.
heading: Eviron vs Ewingsdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eviron, New South Wales and Ewingsdale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ewingsdale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Eviron (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eviron or Ewingsdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eviron has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Ewingsdale scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eviron scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Ewingsdale scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eviron or Ewingsdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ewingsdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
